summary: Added bounded source-block normalization context for project/event materialization replay, landed four context-proven project document_time_status gates, and guarded the generated block FTS index after full-corpus trigram population produced malformed SQLite b-trees.

details: Precomputes exact cited source-block text for project/event submissions whose evidence_refs lack source_quote.
Caps context at 8 refs, 12000 chars per record, and 4000 chars per ref.
Uses block text only as read-only NormalizationContext; does not synthesize payload.raw_text, payload.evidence_quotes, or evidence_refs.source_quote.
Enhanced Station Initiative at White Plains station maps to implemented only with completed-renovation source context.
Zero-Emission commitment maps to active only with continued-progress plus charging-infrastructure source context.
Moodna Viaduct timber replacement and inspection and New Canaan Branch cyclical trackwork map to active only with continuation/funding source context.
records_fts remains populated for identity/name search.
blocks_fts remains schema-only by default because full-corpus Bun/SQLite trigram population produced malformed SQLite FTS b-trees.
Full block FTS can be opted in with MTA_ENABLE_BLOCKS_FTS=1 after the SQLite stack issue is resolved.

event_family.implemented_this_slice: Only the source-block context unlocks landed here; broader event scout slice remains available.

not_completed: bun test packages/db/test/fts.test.ts was stopped after several minutes because the live-corpus records_fts equivalence loop was too slow for the burst turn; SQLite quick_check and direct FTS row-count checks passed.

remaining_lanes: Implement the safe residual event-family scout slice if desired: expected event_family other 157 -> about 143 after accounting for already-unlocked source-block context records.

Decide treatment representation policy for the 39-record noisy/actionable union, especially bus_priority bundles, route_type treatment records, pure monitoring/timeline records, and amenity_or_public_art.
Review the single high-confidence Far Rockaway Branch route merge/key-generation candidate.
Resolve or replace full-source blocks_fts population before re-enabling MTA_ENABLE_BLOCKS_FTS by default.
